metadata.name: IFC Property Knowledge Base
metadata.description: IFC属性知识库，用于存储和检索IFC属性定义

items.name: UnitsInContext
items.definition: Units globally assigned to the project. These are the default units for all measures used in the project.

items.name: LengthUnit
items.definition: The length unit assigned to the project for all length measures.

items.name: AngleUnit
items.definition: The angle unit assigned to the project for all angle measures.

items.name: MassUnit
items.definition: The mass unit assigned to the project for all mass measures.

items.name: TemperatureUnit
items.definition: The temperature unit assigned to the project for all temperature measures.

items.name: TimeUnit
items.definition: The time unit assigned to the project for all time measures.

items.name: AreaUnit
items.definition: The area unit assigned to the project for all area measures.

items.name: VolumeUnit
items.definition: The volume unit assigned to the project for all volume measures.

items.name: FireRating
items.definition: Fire rating for the element. It is given according to the national fire safety classification.

items.name: Thickness
items.definition: The thickness of the wall. It is provided for information only.

items.name: LoadBearing
items.definition: Indicates whether the object is intended to carry loads (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

items.name: ThermalTransmittance
items.definition: Thermal transmittance coefficient (U-Value) of the element.

items.name: Height
items.definition: Height of the door opening.

items.name: Width
items.definition: Width of the door opening.

items.name: SecurityRating
items.definition: Security rating for the door according to local standards.

items.name: AcousticRating
items.definition: Acoustic rating for the door according to local standards.

items.name: Area
items.definition: Area of the space.

items.name: Volume
items.definition: Volume of the space.

items.name: OccupancyType
items.definition: Occupancy type for the space.

items.name: CompressiveStrength
items.definition: Compressive strength of the concrete.

items.name: ConstructionToleranceClass
items.definition: Construction tolerance class designation.

items.name: SurfaceFinish
items.definition: Surface finish designation.

items.name: ReinforcementVolumeRatio
items.definition: Reinforcement volume ratio of the concrete element.
